transcript: Speaker A: Want to know something wild? Duolingo teaches chess. It's all puzzle-based, bite-sized strategy that sticks. It's built for beginners and those who pretend to be pros. Coach Oscar helps everyone the same. Speaker B: Is this your strategy or a cry for help? Speaker A: He loves to humble me as he teaches, but yeah, it's 100% free. Your move. Learn chess on Duolingo today for free.
on_screen_text:
Solve the puzzle
You might see a way to grab my rook for a good price.
Nicely done!
Play Chess
Sweet majesty!
I'm just glad you didn't make it a QUEEN.
My king can't move, but it's...
That's a stalemate!
summary: The ad introduces Duolingo's free chess lessons, highlighting its bite-sized, puzzle-based approach for all levels. It features a humorous interaction with an animated coach character. The call to action invites viewers to learn chess on Duolingo.
